title: Unsupported Post Request to Instagram API
symptom: The workflow fails with an 'Unsupported post request' error when trying to send a message. This indicates that the request is not formatted correctly or is targeting the wrong endpoint.
not_this_if: The request works for other endpoints
No issues with the API key
root_cause: This error occurs when the request is sent to an incorrect API endpoint or when the request body does not conform to the expected structure. For instance, using the Facebook Graph API endpoint instead of the Instagram Graph API endpoint can lead to this issue.
fix_steps: Change the API endpoint to the correct Instagram URL
Ensure the recipient ID is set to the user's ID
Format the request body according to the Instagram API specifications
agent_instruction: Update the API endpoint and request body structure to match Instagram API requirements.
